title: rhododendron exasperatum
intro: Rhododendron exasperatum, also known as the "exasperated rhododendron," is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the rhododendron family. However, I couldn't find any information about this specific plant, but there are many species of rhododendron plants which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
